note: Variable-power ability use (Erik ratified 2026-07-06: three steps; Surge carries backlash; auto-default = minimum intensity the task needs via the sense filter). Conserve/Standard/Surge scale energy and effect. Surge risks backlash (reuse the existing novel-use/backlash system). AUTO never selects Surge — surge is always a deliberate player choice. Selectable via the action intensity dial. Tunable; shape ratified, numbers Aevi's.

conserve.note: Lower energy, reduced effect — easy tasks or husbanding energy.

surge.note: Amplified reach/scope/bonus; backlash risk. Never auto-selected.

autoRule: Engine picks the minimum intensity that clears the task difficulty via the sense filter: trivial/easy -> conserve, standard -> standard, hard-but-doable -> standard. NEVER auto-surge. Player may override to any step at the action point.
surgeBacklashNote: Backlash chance rises on a failed/marginal roll. On backlash the wielder pays by the ability's Tier. High-tier surges (Foreclose T4, Unmake Seal/Hold the Aperture T5) are genuinely dangerous — fits their peril; a surged Foreclose that backlashes hurts.
floors: Conserve cannot drop energy below 2 or take a rank-1 ability below baseline effect. Surge cannot exceed 2x standard energy after rounding. Intensity applies to the ROLL/effect, never bypasses attribute gates or levelReq.
